root_text.an5.286:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.286:1.3: Pāṇātipātī hoti, adinnādāyī hoti, abrahmacārī hoti, musāvādī hoti, surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhāyī hoti.
root_text.an5.286:1.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.286:2.1: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an5.286:2.3: Pāṇātipātā paṭivirato hoti, adinnādānā paṭivirato hoti, abrahmacariyā paṭivirato hoti, musāvādā paṭivirato hoti, surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānā paṭivirato hoti.
root_text.an5.286:2.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an5.286:1.1: “Mendicants, a monk with five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.286:1.3: He kills living creatures, steals, has sex, lies, and consumes beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants.
translation_text.an5.286:1.4: A monk with these five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.286:2.1: A monk with five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.286:2.3: He doesn’t kill living creatures, steal, have sex, lie, or consume beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants.
translation_text.an5.286:2.4: A monk with these five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
